name: Willy-Food Investments Ltd
summary: Willy-Food Investments Ltd imports, exports, markets, and sells food products in Israel. It offers canned fruits, vegetables, and fish; coconut milk, rice vermicelli, mushrooms, roasted/in brine vegetables, vinegar, prepared meal, and milk alternative drink products; oil, sauces, rice, pasta, noodles, juices, cereals, and snacks products; tortillas, toasts, crackers, and corn flour; and dry, chilled, and frozen food products. The company also provides butter, margarine, whipped cream, cheese, and dairy products; and cookies and sweets, and tea and others. It offers its products under Willi-Food, Del Monte, DAAWAT, Completa, Sera, Zanetti, NOBLEZA GAUCHA, and El Pastor brands. The company was formerly known as T.K.D Investment Ltd. and changed its name to Willi-Food Investments Ltd in January 1995. Willy-Food Investments Ltd was founded in 1992 and is based in Yavne, Israel.
